narrative:
Bennington Twp township has 1,309 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
